other_observers: Bill Kaempfer, John VAnderpoel, Gary Matthews and eleven other observers on the BBC field trip;
specific_location: the wetlands between Prewitt and Exit 102 on I-76 on US 6 east side or the road
description: The size of the heron was similar to Snowy Egret. It had a pale bill, yellow legs, and mottled with blue/gray patches.Behaviors: The bird was only observed in flight trailing Snowy Egrets.Call: nonePlumage: 1st Spring
